# 💸  How Do I Make $$ From WPBeginner?

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-01-25 14:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 484

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Ever since I started WPBeginner, a common question I often get
is: how do you monetize WPBeginner and how much do you make?

As I explained in a blog post a while ago, sharing WPBeginner’s
income would not be helpful to our readers because it’s hard to
relate to. (You may read the full post 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..rLlIEvfeohiHVHVVaEhVdto55iJz8sJMNF7scTxlqCI )
 here)

Why?

Because WPBeginner is not a typical blogging business.

We make money by selling our suite of software and WordPress
plugins.

Although we don’t sell them directly on WPBeginner, the
longstanding goodwill that we earned helped us build independent
brands for each of our plugins.

Six-Figure Blogger Courses
--------------------------

You may have seen bloggers labeling themselves as “six-figure
bloggers” or “seven-figure bloggers”.

If this person is selling you a course that will supposedly help
you replicate their success, then 99.9% of the time, it’s a scam.
Don’t waste your time or money.

There are no shortcuts to making money online.

It takes a lot of work, and you have to treat your website like
an actual business. Yes, it is a REAL job.

As long as you’re willing to do the leg work, I think you can
make money blogging. Here are some guides that can help:

- Read this article 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..SUhcRViBYkiP1FZi4a5W5hTktluGxDbA3B58i0Tb030 )
to learn 30 proven ways to make money online

- Watch this YouTube tutorial 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..lTdJ1qliyVLugkme556brzct0pmt0dUZ6o0IFJuwUTE ) on how to sell
digital products in WordPress

Blogging Course: Free from WPBeginner!
--------------------------------------

Did you know you can sign up for a free blogging course on
WPBeginner?

Yes, it’s FREE!

Now you might ask, what is the catch?

I HATE to disappoint the critics, but there is NO catch :)

In fact, I hate it when I see people trying to make quick $$$ by
scamming new users.

That's why I released this course for free! This resource is our
way of giving back to the WPBeginner community.

Enjoy this video course 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0._dUAgRgelWr8hH2hsCVONlEy3d-YodMqtJbBzrQmmjA )
 and don’t forget to share your thoughts with me by replying to
this email :)

Cheers,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
